task_completion.description: Create the root node of the WBS diagram
task_completion.visual_evidence: A central or top-level diagram node containing the text 'Legacy ERP System Migration' is visible on the canvas.

task_completion.description: Create the six Level 1 phase nodes
task_completion.visual_evidence: Six nodes branching directly from the root node, containing the labels for Project Management, Requirements Analysis, System Design, Data Migration, Testing & QA, and Deployment & Training.
Three sub-nodes branching from each of the six Level 1 nodes, containing the specific work packages (e.g., 'Project Planning', 'Unit Testing', 'Data Mapping', etc.) as specified in the instructions.

task_completion.description: Save the diagram as an editable .eddx file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog showing the file name 'erp_migration_wbs.eddx' in the '/home/ga/Diagrams' directory, or the EdrawMax window title reflecting this filename, or the file visible in a file manager.

task_completion.description: Export the diagram as a .png image
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Export' dialog showing the file name 'erp_migration_wbs.png' being saved to the '/home/ga/Diagrams' directory, an export success notification, or the .png file visible in a file manager.

integrity.description: The agent used the EdrawMax GUI to construct the diagram
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the EdrawMax application open with the diagram being actively built using its canvas, toolbars, and menus, rather than a terminal window running a script to generate the file.

integrity.description: The diagram is built using actual nodes and connectors
integrity.visual_evidence: The canvas should show distinct shapes connected by lines (a true WBS structure), not just plain text typed onto a blank page or an imported static image.

integrity.description: The agent navigated to the correct target directory for saving
integrity.visual_evidence: Save/Export dialogs or file manager windows should explicitly show the path '/home/ga/Diagrams', proving the agent didn't just save to the default directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The root node must be exactly 'Legacy ERP System Migration'. There must be 6 Level 1 nodes containing the substrings: 'Project Management', 'Requirements Analysis', 'System Design', 'Data Migration', 'Testing', and 'Deployment'. There must be 18 Level 2 nodes containing the substrings: 'Project Planning', 'Stakeholder Communication', 'Risk Management', 'Current State Assessment', 'Gap Analysis', 'Requirements Documentation', 'Architecture Design', 'Interface Design', 'Security Design', 'Data Mapping', 'ETL Development', 'Data Validation', 'Unit Testing', 'Integration Testing', 'UAT', 'Production Deployment', 'User Training', and 'Post-Go-Live Support'. The final files must be saved to /home/ga/Diagrams/erp_migration_wbs.eddx and /home/ga/Diagrams/erp_migration_wbs.png.
